nodes.name: Lead Intake Sample
nodes.notes: A sample lead payload mirroring buildChicagoShotsLeadIntakePreview's input shape (client name, contact, event type, budget, notes). No trigger, credential, or webhook is wired up — replace with a real source when you're ready to build this for real.

nodes.name: Task Draft
nodes.notes: Represents the task_draft step of the real ops-workflow pipeline (steps, priority, deliverables checklist). Preview-only — nothing is scheduled or assigned here.

nodes.name: Follow-up Draft
nodes.notes: Represents the follow_up_draft step (subject/body/channel_hint). No send action is configured — this is intentionally a dead end until reviewed.

nodes.name: Approval Preview
nodes.notes: Represents handing the drafts to a human for review before anything sends, matching approval_preview.status = preview-only / execution_disabled = true. No integration is connected.

meta.note: Dry-run draft only. No credentials, no webhook, no live trigger. Owner reviews and rebuilds this by hand in the n8n editor before anything is wired up for real. See ../CHICAGOSHOTS_DRY_RUN_WORKFLOW.md.
